data.name: Next step: add size, color, and price variants so this product can be stocked and sold.
data.value: Next step: add size, color, and price variants so this product can be stocked and sold.

data.name: Next step: record the opening stock so this variant is ready for sales.
data.value: Next step: record the opening stock so this variant is ready for sales.

data.name: Accurate stock counts depend on recording every delivery. Add stock-in entries for each variant received to keep inventory up to date.
data.value: Accurate stock counts depend on recording every delivery. Add stock-in entries for each variant received to keep inventory up to date.

data.name: You cannot delete your own account.
data.value: You cannot delete your own account.

data.name: This transaction is managed from its source record and cannot be edited here.
data.value: This transaction is managed from its source record and cannot be edited here.

data.name: This transaction is managed from its source record and cannot be deleted here.
data.value: This transaction is managed from its source record and cannot be deleted here.

data.name: Cannot delete: this feature is assigned to one or more plans. Remove plan assignments first.
data.value: Cannot delete: this feature is assigned to one or more plans. Remove plan assignments first.

data.name: Only pending inquiries can be approved.
data.value: Only pending inquiries can be approved.

data.name: Only pending inquiries can be rejected.
data.value: Only pending inquiries can be rejected.

data.name: This email already has an account.
data.value: This email already has an account.

data.name: The free plan is not configured yet.
data.value: The free plan is not configured yet.

data.name: Account created, but the approval email could not be sent.
data.value: Account created, but the approval email could not be sent.

data.name: Cannot delete: subscriptions are linked to this plan.
data.value: Cannot delete: subscriptions are linked to this plan.

data.name: Failed to delete product. Please try again.
data.value: Failed to delete product. Please try again.

data.name: Failed to delete sale. Please try again.
data.value: Failed to delete sale. Please try again.

data.name: This stock movement was created by a sale and cannot be edited here. Update the sale instead.
data.value: This stock movement was created by a sale and cannot be edited here. Update the sale instead.

data.name: This stock movement was created by a sale and cannot be deleted here. Delete or void the sale instead.
data.value: This stock movement was created by a sale and cannot be deleted here. Delete or void the sale instead.

data.name: This stock movement cannot be deleted because doing so would make stock go below zero.
data.value: This stock movement cannot be deleted because doing so would make stock go below zero.

data.name: Only pending requests can be approved.
data.value: Only pending requests can be approved.

data.name: Only pending requests can be rejected.
data.value: Only pending requests can be rejected.

data.name: Subscription activated, but the approval email could not be sent.
data.value: Subscription activated, but the approval email could not be sent.

data.name: Request rejected, but the rejection email could not be sent.
data.value: Request rejected, but the rejection email could not be sent.

data.name: The free plan is assigned after signup approval and does not require payment.
data.value: The free plan is assigned after signup approval and does not require payment.

data.name: Yearly billing is not available for the selected plan.
data.value: Yearly billing is not available for the selected plan.

data.name: The free plan does not require a payment request.
data.value: The free plan does not require a payment request.

data.name: Tenant created, but the credential email could not be sent.
data.value: Tenant created, but the credential email could not be sent.

data.name: Cannot delete: users are linked to this tenant. Deactivate it instead.
data.value: Cannot delete: users are linked to this tenant. Deactivate it instead.

data.name: This variant cannot be deleted because it still has stock on hand.
data.value: This variant cannot be deleted because it still has stock on hand.

data.name: This variant cannot be deleted because it already has stock movement history.
data.value: This variant cannot be deleted because it already has stock movement history.

data.name: Track all cash moving in and out of your business.
data.value: Track all cash moving in and out of your business.

data.name: Record money received or money spent.
data.value: Record money received or money spent.

data.name: Add and manage user accounts for your workspace.
data.value: Add and manage user accounts for your workspace.

data.name: User limit reached. Upgrade your plan to add more users.
data.value: User limit reached. Upgrade your plan to add more users.

data.name: Control staff access and low-stock alerts for your workspace.
data.value: Control staff access and low-stock alerts for your workspace.

data.name: These settings affect staff accounts only. Admins always keep full access.
data.value: These settings affect staff accounts only. Admins always keep full access.

data.name: Choose which sections staff can open. Hidden sections are removed completely from staff navigation.
data.value: Choose which sections staff can open. Hidden sections are removed completely from staff navigation.

data.name: View overview metrics, sales trends, and business highlights.
data.value: View overview metrics, sales trends, and business highlights.

data.name: View income, expenses, profit, and cashflow pages.
data.value: View income, expenses, profit, and cashflow pages.

data.name: View product list and product details.
data.value: View product list and product details.

data.name: View product variants such as SKU, size, and color.
data.value: View product variants such as SKU, size, and color.

data.name: View purchase records for textiles and materials.
data.value: View purchase records for textiles and materials.

data.name: View stock in, stock out, and movement history.
data.value: View stock in, stock out, and movement history.

data.name: View current stock balance for each variant.
data.value: View current stock balance for each variant.

data.name: View sales history, invoices, and sale records.
data.value: View sales history, invoices, and sale records.

data.name: View customer profiles, contacts, and purchase history.
data.value: View customer profiles, contacts, and purchase history.

data.name: Variants at or below this threshold are marked as low stock across the app and in Telegram alerts.
data.value: Variants at or below this threshold are marked as low stock across the app and in Telegram alerts.

data.name: Show low-stock warning badges to staff users.
data.value: Show low-stock warning badges to staff users.

data.name: Hidden sections disappear from staff navigation and staff cannot open them directly. Admins always keep full access.
data.value: Hidden sections disappear from staff navigation and staff cannot open them directly. Admins always keep full access.

data.name: Current stock balance for each product variant.
data.value: Current stock balance for each product variant.

data.name: This will permanently remove the workspace and all its data.
data.value: This will permanently remove the workspace and all its data.

data.name: This tenant has {0} linked user(s). You can deactivate it, or force delete it together with all related users and tenant data.
data.value: This tenant has {0} linked user(s). You can deactivate it, or force delete it together with all related users and tenant data.

data.name: This tenant has no users and can be safely deleted.
data.value: This tenant has no users and can be safely deleted.

data.name: Force delete removes the tenant, linked users, subscriptions, inventory, sales, customers, expenses, uploads, and related records.
data.value: Force delete removes the tenant, linked users, subscriptions, inventory, sales, customers, expenses, uploads, and related records.

data.name: This tenant contains a SuperAdmin account and cannot be force deleted.
data.value: This tenant contains a SuperAdmin account and cannot be force deleted.

data.name: Tenant '{0}' and all related users/data were permanently deleted.
data.value: Tenant '{0}' and all related users/data were permanently deleted.
